subcodes.title: Words to Jinab-i-Hizari et al, spoken on 1913-09-10
subcodes.first_line: Today was exceedingly warm. The Apostle of God - may peace be upon Him - hath declared: "O God! Make our summer a summer indeed, and our winter a winter." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز خیلی گرم بود حضرت رسول فرموده است اللهم اجعل صیفنا صیف و شتائنا شتا
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @education of children; moral education, @oneness; unity of religion, @station of the Manifestation of God, @stories; anecdotes, @humility; meekness; lowliness
